title: Italian Options Poinsettia Natural Linen Wired Ribbon, Wide Christmas Hessian Ribbon for Crafts, Gift Wrapping Accessories, Wreaths, Tree Decorations, Burlap Fabric, Natural, 63 mm x 10 Metre Roll
features: WIRED-EDGE RIBBON: This beautiful, festive natural linen ribbon is adorned with large, deep-red poinsettia flowers, foliage, and fir cones. With a wired edge, it provides maximum hold and versatile styling options for decorative crafts and gift wrapping.

PREMIUM LINEN RIBBON: Measuring 63 mm x 10 metres, this extra-wide, high-quality, linen-textured craft ribbon has a charming woven pattern and wired edges. Soft yet structured, it’s fray-resistant and perfect for floral displays and handmade bows.

VERSATILE CRAFTS: A must-have for your craft supplies, these linen jute ribbons will elevate cosmetics, scented products, millinery, chocolates, gift wrapping, paper crafts, wreaths, bouquets, and hampers.
QUALITY ASSURANCE: At Italian Options, our decorative Christmas tree ribbons are manufactured to the highest standards, ensuring gift wrap and craft accessories that last.

ABOUT US: Founded in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company supplying premium craft supplies for over 38 years, including wedding favours, stationery, and decorations to help you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special moments.
description: Add a touch of seasonal charm to any craft project with our decorative wired-edge natural linen Christmas ribbon. Made from 100% linen, this Christmas ribbon is decorated with beautiful deep-red poinsettia flowers, fir cones, and foliage. The wired edging is designed to provide maximum hold and enhance your styling options, adding structure and sophistication to your creations. This seasonal ribbon is durable and versatile, ideal for a wide range of applications — from creating handmade bows, decorating gifts, wreaths, and hampers to embellishing craft projects — making every celebration unforgettable. Established in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company specialising in high-quality craft supplies and event decorations, helping you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special occasions — perfect for home crafters, DIYers, and event planners alike. Each wired-edge linen ribbon measures 63 mm in width and is supplied on a 10-metre roll.
